Primary_definition_neutral_<=50w: A policy and practice agenda to distribute costs and benefits of decarbonisation fairly, protect workers and communities, and provide pathways for new livelihoods.
Contestation_note_<=50w: Scope differs: jobs vs ecosystems vs intergenerational claims; who pays and who benefits is disputed.
Perspective_Regulation_<=40w: Anchored in ILO, EU Green Deal, national JTIs.
Perspective_SocioTechnical_<=40w: Shifts regime rules to include labor and place-based compensation.
Perspective_Justice_<=40w: Distributional, procedural, recognition, and restorative dimensions.
Perspective_Ops_Engineering_<=40w: Retraining, redeployment, safety; phased asset closure schedules.
Perspective_Community_<=40w: Guarantees participation and shared gains in host neighborhoods.
Perspective_OceanActor_<=40w: Frames sea-dependent livelihoods and marine ecologies as co-beneficiaries.
Use_case_or_scene: Coal terminal phase-out with retraining and district energy hub

Primary_definition_neutral_<=50w: Electric supply from shore to a berthed vessel to replace onboard generation.
Contestation_note_<=50w: Grid emissions, tariff design, and cost allocation trigger disputes.
Perspective_Regulation_<=40w: IMO/EU directives, port by-laws, connection codes.
Perspective_SocioTechnical_<=40w: Niche scaling subject to standards and lock-ins.
Perspective_Justice_<=40w: Noise/air relief at receptors; affordability for small operators.
Perspective_Ops_Engineering_<=40w: Cabinets, frequency conversion, load mgmt, safety.
Perspective_Community_<=40w: Expect quieter nights and cleaner air at waterfronts.
Perspective_OceanActor_<=40w: Reduces marine air deposition; alters harbor soundscape.
Use_case_or_scene: OPS quiet window 22:00–06:00 for cruise berth

Primary_definition_neutral_<=50w: Approaches that increase public control and participation in energy systems.
Contestation_note_<=50w: Ownership models vs grid reliability and cost recovery.
Perspective_Regulation_<=40w: Municipal energy statutes; community energy provisions.
Perspective_SocioTechnical_<=40w: User-producer roles; prosumer niches; governance shifts.
Perspective_Ops_Engineering_<=40w: Grid integration of distributed assets in ports/cities.
Perspective_Community_<=40w: Co-ops, community benefit agreements near terminals.
Use_case_or_scene: Community solar on port warehouses with benefit-sharing
Citation_1_APA: Szulecki, K. (2018). Energy democracy as a process, vision, and movement.
